gems.title: 真爱留声
gems.summary: 年轻女子给已故姐姐发送的搞笑自白语音留言无意中被转给了陌生人，而这个陌生人竟隔着遥远的距离爱上了她。
gems.summaryEn: A young woman's hilariously confessional voicemails to her late sister are unknowingly redirected to a stranger, who begins to fall in love from afar.
gems.whyWatch: 用幽默包裹的深情，跨越生死的浪漫让人心头一暖。
gems.whyWatchEn: A heartwarming romantic comedy that uses humor to bridge grief and distance, delivering unexpected emotional depth.
gems.audience: 喜欢轻松治愈爱情片、不介意催泪元素的观众
gems.audienceEn: Fans of lighthearted yet emotional romances and tearjerker comedies.

gems.title: 火遮眼
gems.summary: 女儿在街头被拐走，店主（谢苗 饰）探寻一个复杂的犯罪网络，不择手段将女儿救回来。他唯一的盟友是一名记者（乔•塔斯利姆 饰）。这两个来自不同背景的人物必须学会相互信任、合作，运用自己不为人知的过去所赋予的格斗技能。
gems.summaryEn: After a criminal network kidnaps Wang Wei's daughter and the corrupt police refuse to assist him, Wei sets out on his own to locate her. Navin, a tenacious journalist whose wife has mysteriously vanis
gems.whyWatch: 硬核动作与父爱执念交织，草根复仇的暴力美学。
gems.whyWatchEn: A gritty, high-octane thriller where a father’s relentless love fuels a brutal quest through a criminal underworld.
gems.audience: 热衷硬核打斗、暗黑复仇故事的影迷
gems.audienceEn: Viewers who enjoy raw, visceral action and dark revenge narratives.

gems.title: 玩具总动员5
gems.summary: 胡迪、巴斯光年、翠斯等“元老级”玩具将跟随小主人邦妮的成长脚步，共同迎接数字时代下的全新挑战。随着无所不能的科技产品逐渐走进童年世界，一批充满科技感的崭新角色也随之重磅亮相：青蛙造型的智能平板小荷、憨态可掬的导航玩具小不丢、活力十足的抓拍好手小拍侠，以及自带笑点的臭屁小机灵。当身边的同龄朋友们开始沉浸在科技玩具带来的“电子陪伴”中，而玩具伙伴们也迎来了前所未有的生存难题：在屏幕占据注意力的时代，玩
gems.summaryEn: When Bonnie receives a Lilypad tablet as a gift and becomes obsessed, Buzz, Woody, Jessie and the rest of the gang's jobs become exponentially harder when they have to go head to head with the all-new
gems.whyWatch: 经典IP勇敢直面数字时代，怀旧与创新碰撞出温情火花。
gems.whyWatchEn: A clever, emotionally resonant take on the clash between traditional toys and digital play, staying true to the franchise’s heart.
gems.audience: 陪伴皮克斯长大的老粉丝及带娃家庭
gems.audienceEn: Longtime Pixar fans and families with young children.
